channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: livetennisapi/livetennisapi-mcp
item.description: MCP server for the Live Tennis API — give Claude, Cursor and other LLM agents real-time tennis scores, odds and model win-probability — ⭐249, JavaScript

item.title: risa-labs-inc/BossConsole
item.description: Open-source, multi-platform harness for AI agents — a native, multi-threaded operator's console (JVM, not Electron) to run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini or OpenCode with a real browser, terminal, editor, — ⭐38, Kotlin

item.title: MaxEllis/orcaslicer-mcp
item.description: OrcaSlicer MCP — drive OrcaSlicer from Claude or any MCP client: load models, tune settings, slice, analyze — ⭐13, Python

item.title: TipRanks/mcp
item.description: Official TipRanks MCP server — live analyst ratings, Smart Score, technicals, options, insider/hedge-fund activity, ETFs, and your TipRanks portfolios for AI agents. Hosted at mcp.tipranks.com/mcp/. — ⭐9, n/a

item.title: hoangann2000/figma-mcp-console
item.description: MCP server that lets your AI assistant read and write Figma in real time — no API token, no rate limits. Works with Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Codex and any MCP client. — ⭐8, Go

item.title: GrubbyLee/skill-manager
item.description: Zero-dependency CLI to scan, recommend, deduplicate, audit, and visualize Claude Code / Codex skills and MCP servers. — ⭐8, JavaScript

item.title: OATH-md/OathMCP
item.description: Agent-native MCP server for evidence-backed clinical calculators. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: cvtmysxul/yougile-mcp
item.description: Secure, policy-driven MCP server for the YouGile REST API. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: Octolabo/malskanner
item.description: Scan a repo for hidden prompt-injection before your AI agent trusts it — CLI, MCP server & GitHub Action. Run: npx malskanner <repo>. 0 false positives across 5,620 files. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: devswha/insane-review-mcp
item.description: Run insane-review (GPT Pro web review) from any harness — pipx CLI + MCP server over the pinned upstream engine (fivetaku/insane-review). — ⭐3, Python

item.title: ashu017/screener-mcp
item.description: MCP server exposing Screener.in data for Indian stocks (NSE/BSE) — fundamentals, financial statements, peer comparison, and price/EPS trends — as tools for Claude and other MCP clients. — ⭐3, HTML

item.title: rn-devtools-hub/rn-devtools-hub
item.description: Local inspector for React Native and Expo apps: network, crashes, storage, SQLite, screen mirror, remote actions and MCP server, streamed to a web dashboard. Zero native dependencies. Docs: https://rn — ⭐3, HTML

item.title: EzzoHamdan/house-of-wisdom-mcp
item.description: House of Wisdom MCP — multi-model consultation council. Diverse AI model families investigate independently and return their own perspectives; the orchestrator weighs them. Inspired by the medieval Ba — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Vaskrokodile/parallax
item.description: Blackboard MCP server for coordinating parallel subagents across Claude Code and Codex — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: shigella520/MindTrain
item.description: AI-driven knowledge training platform with pluggable schedulers, Codex Skill integration, and optional Anki/FSRS support. — ⭐53, Java

item.title: AIPAYagent/aipay-protocol
item.description: Verifier-backed USDC escrow for AI agents: signed orders, evidence hashes, Polygon deposits, and deterministic settlement. — ⭐31, TypeScript

item.title: dpmadsen/multimodels-mcp
item.description: MCP server that lets Claude Code delegate tasks to GPT-5.6 (Codex CLI), DeepSeek, GLM, OpenRouter and local LM Studio models — plus a 198-run benchmark of all of them — ⭐12, TypeScript

item.title: tk-fantasy/fantasy
item.description: AI smart home assistant for Home Assistant: LangGraph agent + MCP tools + RAG knowledge graph + vision perception — ⭐11, Python

item.title: Trainspotting31/memory-buddy
item.description: Shared memory layer for AI agents. Deploy once, connect Hermes/Trae/Cursor/Claude Desktop via MCP - they all share one memory. $0/month on Cloudflare free tier. — ⭐10, TypeScript

item.title: masteryee-labs/Open-Godot-MCP
item.description: Open-source MCP server for AI-autonomous Godot game development. Deterministic playtesting, multiplayer testing, DAP debugging, LSP, token-efficient. 100% MIT. — ⭐8, Python

item.title: cuongnbms/mastering-claude-code
item.description: Cẩm nang thực chiến Mastering Claude Code (tiếng Việt): 16 chương biên soạn từ tài liệu chính thức của Anthropic — CLI, workflows, MCP, subagents, skills, hooks, plugins, CI/CD & tối ưu context. — ⭐6, n/a

item.title: Ivinco/gocd-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for GoCD, with per-user access-token auth — ⭐5, Go

item.title: lm060719/reconbridge
item.description: 通用逆向分析 KernelSU 模块：手机侧只做原子能力，智能全在 PC 侧（Claude Code + MCP）。仅限授权安全研究与教育用途。 — ⭐5, Python

item.title: photoshootapp/photoshoot-ai-design
item.description: Official Photoshoot.app MCP server. Generate studio-quality AI product photos, photoshoot ideas, and commercial visuals directly from Claude, Cursor, Codex, and MCP clients. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: frangelbarrera/code-review-agent-mcp
item.description: AI code review agent MCP server. Reviews code like a kernel maintainer: blunt, technical, no sugarcoating. Detects bugs + OWASP Top 10 security vulnerabilities. 4 harshness levels. Anti-RLHF. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: mtbun/storeshots-mcp
item.description: Store-ready App Store & Google Play screenshots from any MCP client. Device frames, benefit-driven headlines, exact store dimensions. No API keys. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: JinyangWang27/people-context
item.description: Local-first memory for the people in your life—an MCP server and CLI that gives AI agents durable identity, relationship, and communication context. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: Umairkhan2324/trilith
item.description: Trilith v0.1 beta — context engineering for agents (budgeted memory, 3 tiers, audit trail). Core is Python; use via REST or adapters (LangGraph / OpenAI Agents / Claude / TS). Needs trilith serve loca — ⭐3, Python

item.title: v0id-byte/ragkernel
item.description: A verifiable engineering knowledge engine that turns technical documents, CAD models, and equipment data into structured knowledge for humans and AI agents. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Hyper-Solutions/hypersolutions-claude-code
item.description: Claude Code plugin for the Hyper Solutions anti-bot API: integrate and debug request-based scrapers for Akamai, Incapsula, DataDome, and Kasada, with live request-capture (powhttp) and HAR-analysis MC — ⭐3, Python
